text.title: Prompt Changelog Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a changelog entry and a per-deploy summary.

field.name: entry.prev_hash
field.notes: empty only for the first ever entry

field.name: entry.eval_delta
field.notes: map of eval_suite_name to before/after scores

field.name: deploy_summary.model_versions
field.notes: map of provider to model id and version

forbidden.pattern: entry.hash mismatch with the actual normalised SHA of the file at commit time
entry.eval_delta empty OR not produced by the CI eval runner (hand-typed numbers)
entry.intent shorter than 8 words OR a token like "tweak", "minor edit", "wording fix"
entry.rollback_hash missing for any entry after the first (rollback path must always be available)
deploy_summary missing for any production deploy that includes a prompt change
entry.rollout = immediate AND eval_delta shows regression on any tracked metric

allowed-transformations.transformation: Squash multiple iterative edits made within a single PR into one changelog entry, preserving the eval delta of the merged net change.
Reference an eval suite by id only in the entry; full eval results live in the eval-runner artifact, linked from the entry.
Mark an entry as `experiment` when the rollout is shadow or 5% canary; promote to `live` after the canary holds.

list.item: Each prompt is in its own file or YAML key (not inlined in source)
Hash present and matches normalised SHA of the file
Intent is a sentence, not a label
Eval delta produced by the runner, not hand-typed
Deploy summary committed with every release
